design_tokens.source_pattern_note: inspired_by_kami_patterns: executable page proof checks, embedded font inspection, density/whitespace scan, and sample-role checklist; visual identity remains Book Forge.

heading.chapter_opening: restrained chapter number plus clear chapter title hierarchy
heading.section: tighter sans-serif hierarchy with visible spacing before section movement
heading.subsection: body-adjacent hierarchy, no oversized dashboard-style labels

body.paragraph_rhythm: Chinese nonfiction body text with stable line length and controlled paragraph spacing
body.widow_orphan_policy: manual proof review required for final export

caption.label_treatment: warm accent label separated from body prose

table.density: small readable type without decorative grid overload
table.break_policy: avoid ambiguous split tables in publication proof

callout.style: light warm background with left rule
callout.spacing: controlled inner spacing and separation from body prose

front_matter.title_page: designed title page rather than plain backend default
front_matter.toc: reader-facing table of contents without production metadata

visual_qa_expectations.review_pdf_policy: unchecked proof QA remains warning-only for ordinary review PDFs

publication_design_profile.page_geometry: A5 e-book proof, 148mm x 210mm, 18mm side margins, 18/20mm top/bottom margins, readable line length for Chinese nonfiction.
publication_design_profile.typography_hierarchy: Noto Serif CJK SC body, PingFang SC chapter headings, restrained chapter numbers, increased section spacing, running heads, and table of contents.
publication_design_profile.caption_style: Small sans-serif captions with a warm accent label and spacing separated from body prose.
publication_design_profile.figure_treatment: Figures centered, constrained to text width, protected by Pandoc resource paths, with captions checked in rendered pages.
publication_design_profile.table_treatment: Booktabs-style tables, small readable type, alternating vertical rhythm, and no decorative grid overload.
publication_design_profile.callout_style: Block quotes and note-like passages have a light warm background, left rule, and controlled inner spacing.
publication_design_profile.headers_footers: Upper running head with section context and centered footer page number.
publication_design_profile.page_numbering: Arabic page numbers in footer, stable for PDF review and proof inspection.
publication_design_profile.visual_rhythm: A5 page, designed title page, table of contents, chapter openings with whitespace, tighter section levels, controlled paragraph spacing, captions, tables, callouts, running heads, and page numbers to avoid plain default pages.
publication_design_profile.rendered_page_inspection_plan: Render pages at 180 DPI or higher, write a helper machine-baseline inspection when possible, then manually inspect title page, table of contents, chapter opening, dense body page, figure/table page, callout page, and last page for nonblank content, clipped glyphs, caption proximity, page numbers, headers, and visual rhythm.
